name: Sour Milk Jumbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening to a cream and gradually add the sugar. Beat in the eggs one at a time, and beat after each addition until the mixture is as light as possible.
2. If you need a break, rest for a few minutes.
3. Mix and sift the dry ingredients (using about 1/4 teaspoon of nutmeg unless you prefer more up to 1 teaspoon). Stir this into the mixture alternating with the buttermilk.
4. Roll the dough out to about 1/4 inch thick and cut with a doughnut cutter.
5. Bake in a moderately hot oven (375°F) for 12-15 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with granulated sugar as soon as removed from the oven.
